text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's just like they say, "Where<n>there's a will,
there's a way"! Don't<n>you agree, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm back, baby! The Takarazuka<n>Kinen has just
witnessed a miracle!<n>Matikanefukukitaru for the
wiiiin!
choice_data_list: Your fans are having a blast.
Your fans are having a blast.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right? I was practically walking on air<n>when I
heard the cheers from the<n>stands!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We'll just have to keep up thismomentum and push through the restof summer. Speaking of which, it'sbeen a while since we did that, hasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's fortune slip time! Let's see<n>where we're
racing next!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm not falling back on old habits,<n>don't worry.
Back then, I was letting<n>luck take the wheel, but
today's<n>different.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So, please draw a slip, Trainer.Aaaand, go!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the<n>Hakodate Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Hakodate Kinen! Nice! That<n>million-dollar
nightscape is waiting for<n>us!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the<n>Kokura Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Kokura Kinen! The dwelling place<n>of the gods
of fire! A summer down in<n>Kyushu is sure to bring
the heat!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the<n>Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Sapporo Kinen! I guess the snow<n>festival
won't be happening in<n>summer, but I'm sure we
can think<n>up something just as festive if we<n>win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So that decides our summer plans.<n>But know that I
didn't just leave it up<n>to luck, okay?
choice_data_list: Then why did you choose this way?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, this shows we can take on<n>anything that fate
has in store for us!<n>So let's work together to have
a<n>blissful summer!
